idea: finance automation - AI-powered multi-agent system for finance workflows

research.problem_statement: Businesses in finance spend significant manual effort on: finance automation - AI-powered multi-agent system for finance workflows. This automation eliminates repetitive tasks, reduces errors, and accelerates turnaround.
research.target_audience: Accounting teams, fintech startups, CFO offices
research.competitor_analysis: Reconciliation tools are rule-based. AI-powered matching and anomaly detection is the gap.
research.technical_feasibility: Medium — requires domain expertise, some custom integrations needed
research.roi_estimate: Eliminates 80% of manual reconciliation. Pays for itself in 2-4 weeks.

roadmap.project_name: Finance Automation Ai Powered Multi Agent System F
roadmap.description: Businesses in finance spend significant manual effort on: finance automation - AI-powered multi-agent system for finance workflows. This automation eliminates repetitive tasks, reduces errors, and accelerates turnaround.

agent_pipeline.name: data_extractor
agent_pipeline.role: Extract transactions from bank feeds, invoices, receipts

agent_pipeline.name: report_generator
agent_pipeline.role: Generate P&L, cash flow, balance sheet reports

agent_pipeline.name: audit_trail
agent_pipeline.role: Maintain audit trail, flag compliance issues, generate audit packages

milestones.name: Agent 1: data_extractor
milestones.acceptance: Agent processes input and produces validated output for extract transactions from bank feeds, invoices, receipts

milestones.name: Agent 2: reconciliation_agent
milestones.acceptance: Agent processes input and produces validated output for match transactions, flag anomalies, auto-categorize

milestones.name: Agent 3: report_generator
milestones.acceptance: Agent processes input and produces validated output for generate p&l, cash flow, balance sheet reports

milestones.name: Agent 4: audit_trail
milestones.acceptance: Agent processes input and produces validated output for maintain audit trail, flag compliance issues, generate audit packages

milestones.name: Integration & Publish
milestones.deliverable: Full pipeline tested, repo published, marketplace listing created
milestones.acceptance: End-to-end pipeline runs, all tests pass, repo is public
